title: navarretia watsonii
intro: Navarretia watsonii, also known as Watson's pincushion, is a rare species of flowering plant in the phlox family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Navarretia watsonii are said to include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and expectorant blends.
